summary: Bug fix verification COMPLETE. The 'Congrats Card Sent' mislabeling bug is FIXED. All 45 regression and API tests pass. Frontend Activity page confirms different card types (Birthday, Holiday, Thank You, Welcome, Anniversary, Congrats) now display with correct labels.

pytest_event_types.details: 38/38 unit tests pass - link type mapping, labels, card sent/viewed info, no congrats fallback

api_master_feed.details: GET /api/contacts/{user_id}/master-feed returns correct event_type and title fields

api_contact_events.details: GET /api/contacts/{user_id}/{contact_id}/events returns events with titles derived from centralized labels

frontend_activity_page.details: Activity page shows all card types with correct labels: Holiday Card Sent, Birthday Card Sent, Congrats Card Sent, Anniversary Card Sent, Welcome Card Sent, Thank You Card Sent

frontend_contact_page.details: Contact page Feed tab shows correct event labels (Holiday Card Sent, Birthday Card Sent)

event_type_labels_no_congrats_fallback.details: CRITICAL BUG VERIFIED FIXED: Birthday, Thank You, Holiday, Welcome, Anniversary cards show correct labels - NOT falling back to 'Congrats Card Sent'

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Activity page and Contact page both display correct event labels)

context_for_next_testing_agent: The 'Congrats Card Sent' mislabeling bug has been verified as FIXED. The fix includes: (1) resolve_event_type() in backend/utils/event_types.py now does DB lookup for /congrats/ URLs to find actual card_type, (2) Frontend passes event_type when returning from card creation, (3) Backend always derives titles from centralized labels in get_event_label(), (4) Migration endpoint POST /api/contacts/admin/fix-event-types can fix old data. All 45 tests pass.

mocked_apis.Twilio SMS: MOCKED - SMS sends are logged but not actually delivered

key_findings.bug_description: Various card types (Birthday, Holiday, Thank You, etc.) were all being incorrectly logged as 'Congrats Card Sent' in the activity feed
key_findings.root_cause: The old resolve_event_type() had a catch-all '/congrats/' pattern that matched all card types since ALL card URLs use /congrats/ prefix
key_findings.fix_verified: Activity page now shows: Holiday Card Sent, Birthday Card Sent, Congrats Card Sent, Anniversary Card Sent, Welcome Card Sent, Thank You Card Sent - each with their correct specific label
